name: Mom20+60+Med+Top1
description: A 4-state hybrid rotator that counts three independent bullish conditions on QQQ — a 200-bar price median trend gate, a 20-day return, and a 60-day return — and maps the count to allocations across TQQQ, the largest-cap stock, and cash. Full agreement produces 100% TQQQ; partial agreement blends in the top market-cap stock; no agreement moves to cash via BIL. The universe selection targets the top dollar-volume stocks, narrowed to a single large-cap holding.
overfit_notes: Three momentum inputs (median gate, 20-day, 60-day) with non-standard allocation weights at n=3 (1.0/0.0/0.0), n=2 (0.7/0.3/0.0), n=1 (0.0/0.5/0.5), and n=0 (0.0/0.0/1.0). The 0.7/0.3 split at n=2 is custom-tuned.

rules.label: Trend gate
rules.text: QQQ price > 200-bar historical median

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: n = count of: [trend gate, 20-day positive return, 60-day positive return]; n=3 → 100% TQQQ; n=2 → 70% TQQQ+30% Top-1; n=1 → 50% Top-1+50% BIL; n=0 → 100% BIL

rules.label: Symbols
rules.text: Signal: QQQ. Execution: TQQQ / largest market-cap stock / BIL

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open; trades only on state change

name: Mom 20+60+120 + Top-3
description: A 5-state hybrid rotator that counts four bullish conditions on QQQ — a 200-bar median gate plus 20-, 60-, and 120-day returns — and maps the count to allocations across TQQQ, an equal-weight basket of the top-3 market-cap stocks, and cash. Full agreement leads to 100% TQQQ; with no signal confirming, the portfolio goes entirely to cash. The top-3 stock basket is used as an intermediate risk-off position rather than a single mega-cap stock.
overfit_notes: Four signals (median gate, 20-, 60-, 120-day returns) and a 5-level allocation table. The all-cash plan at n=0 is distinct from sibling strategies. Top-3 universe selection by market cap within the top-100 dollar-volume stocks adds selection tuning.

rules.label: Trend gate
rules.text: QQQ price > 200-bar historical median

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: n = count of: [trend gate, 20-day return, 60-day return, 120-day return]; n=4 → 100% TQQQ; n=3 → 50% TQQQ+50% Top-3; n=2 → 100% Top-3; n=1 → 100% Top-3; n=0 → 100% cash (all liquidated)

rules.label: Symbols
rules.text: Signal: QQQ. Execution: TQQQ / top-3 market-cap stocks (equal weight) / cash

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open; trades only on state change

name: Mom20+ADX+Med 4-state
description: A 4-state momentum-strength hybrid that combines a 200-bar price median trend gate, a 20-day return, and the directional bias of ADX on QQQ to graduate TQQQ vs. cash allocation. Each bullish signal adds one step of TQQQ exposure, with a custom allocation table mapping 0–3 bullish signals to 0–100% TQQQ. The ADX component uses the directional index comparison rather than an absolute level threshold.
overfit_notes: Three inputs (median gate, 20-day return, ADX +DI > -DI) with a tuned 4-level allocation: (1.0, 0.0), (0.7, 0.3), (0.3, 0.7), (0.0, 1.0). The 0.7/0.3 and 0.3/0.7 splits are non-standard.

rules.label: Trend gate
rules.text: QQQ price > 200-bar historical median

rules.label: Strength filter
rules.text: ADX(14) positive directional index > negative directional index

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: n = count of: [trend gate, 20-day return, ADX bullish]; n=3 → 100% TQQQ; n=2 → 70% TQQQ+30% BIL; n=1 → 30% TQQQ+70% BIL; n=0 → 100% BIL

rules.label: Symbols
rules.text: Signal: QQQ. Execution: TQQQ / BIL

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open; trades only on state change

name: Mom20+W%R+Med 4-state
description: A 4-state momentum hybrid that uses a 200-bar price median trend gate, a 20-day return, and Williams %R on QQQ to step TQQQ and cash allocation. The Williams %R component uses the midline as its threshold, treating values above -50 as bullish. The 4-state allocation table is identical to the ADX sibling in this batch.
overfit_notes: Three inputs: median gate, 20-day return, and Williams %R(14) > -50. The -50 midline threshold is canonical for W%R. The 0.7/0.3 and 0.3/0.7 allocation splits are custom-tuned.

rules.label: Trend gate
rules.text: QQQ price > 200-bar historical median

rules.label: Strength filter
rules.text: Williams %R(14) > -50

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: n = count of: [trend gate, 20-day return, W%R bullish]; n=3 → 100% TQQQ; n=2 → 70% TQQQ+30% BIL; n=1 → 30% TQQQ+70% BIL; n=0 → 100% BIL

rules.label: Symbols
rules.text: Signal: QQQ. Execution: TQQQ / BIL

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open; trades only on state change

name: Mom20+OBV+Med 4-state
description: A 4-state momentum-volume hybrid that pairs a 200-bar price median trend gate and a 20-day return with a custom OBV slope signal on QQQ. On-balance volume is accumulated over 200 bars and a linear regression slope over the last 30 OBV values is computed manually; a positive slope is treated as bullish. The allocation table steps TQQQ and BIL in the same 4-level pattern as the ADX and W%R siblings.
overfit_notes: Three inputs: median gate, 20-day return, and a hand-computed OBV linear slope over 30 bars. The 30-bar OBV regression window and the sign-only slope condition are both tuned choices. Allocation splits of 0.7/0.3 and 0.3/0.7 are custom.

rules.label: Trend gate
rules.text: QQQ price > 200-bar historical median

rules.label: Strength filter
rules.text: OBV linear regression slope over last 30 bars > 0

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: n = count of: [trend gate, 20-day return, OBV slope positive]; n=3 → 100% TQQQ; n=2 → 70% TQQQ+30% BIL; n=1 → 30% TQQQ+70% BIL; n=0 → 100% BIL

rules.label: Symbols
rules.text: Signal: QQQ. Execution: TQQQ / BIL

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open; trades only on state change

name: Mom20+Sto+Med+Top1
description: A 4-state hybrid rotator that uses a 200-bar price median gate, a 20-day return, and Stochastic %K on QQQ to step exposures across TQQQ, the largest market-cap stock, and cash. Full bull agreement goes to 100% TQQQ; partial agreement blends in the top-1 large-cap stock; no signal goes to a mix of the top-1 stock and BIL. The Stochastic uses the 50-level midline as its bull/bear threshold.
overfit_notes: Three inputs: median gate, 20-day return, and Stochastic %K(14,3,3) > 50. The plan at n=1 (0.0/1.0/0.0) and n=0 (0.0/0.5/0.5) redirect risk to a stock rather than to BIL, which is a custom design choice.

rules.label: Trend gate
rules.text: QQQ price > 200-bar historical median

rules.label: Strength filter
rules.text: Stochastic %K(14,3,3) > 50

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: n = count of: [trend gate, 20-day return, Stochastic bullish]; n=3 → 100% TQQQ; n=2 → 50% TQQQ+50% Top-1; n=1 → 100% Top-1; n=0 → 50% Top-1+50% BIL

rules.label: Symbols
rules.text: Signal: QQQ. Execution: TQQQ / largest market-cap stock / BIL

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open; trades only on state change

name: Mom20+OBV+ADX+Med 5-state
description: A 5-state momentum rotator that scores four independent signals on QQQ — a 200-bar median gate, a 20-day return, ADX directional bias, and OBV regression slope — and maps the count to a proportional TQQQ vs. BIL allocation. Each additional bullish signal adds 25% to TQQQ allocation. The OBV slope is computed via linear regression over 30 bars of manually accumulated on-balance volume.
overfit_notes: Four inputs: median gate, 20-day return, ADX +DI > -DI, and OBV slope > 0 over 30 bars. The 30-bar OBV regression window and the 5-level step table (0%, 25%, 50%, 75%, 100%) are tuned design choices.

rules.label: Trend gate
rules.text: QQQ price > 200-bar historical median

rules.label: Strength filter
rules.text: ADX(14) +DI > -DI AND OBV linear regression slope (30 bars) > 0

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: n = count of: [trend gate, 20-day return, ADX bullish, OBV slope positive]; TQQQ weight = n×25%, BIL weight = (4−n)×25%

rules.label: Symbols
rules.text: Signal: QQQ. Execution: TQQQ / BIL

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open; trades only on state change

name: Mom20+W%R+OBV+Med 5-state
description: A 5-state momentum rotator that scores four signals on QQQ — a 200-bar median gate, a 20-day return, Williams %R, and OBV regression slope — and maps the sum to a proportional TQQQ vs. BIL step allocation. It replaces the ADX component from the sibling strategy with Williams %R at the -50 midline threshold. The OBV slope is computed via linear regression over 30 bars.
overfit_notes: Four inputs: median gate, 20-day return, W%R(14) > -50, and OBV slope (30-bar regression) > 0. Canonical W%R threshold of -50; the 5-step allocation and 30-bar OBV window are tuned.

rules.label: Trend gate
rules.text: QQQ price > 200-bar historical median

rules.label: Strength filter
rules.text: Williams %R(14) > -50 AND OBV linear regression slope (30 bars) > 0

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: n = count of: [trend gate, 20-day return, W%R bullish, OBV slope positive]; TQQQ weight = n×25%, BIL weight = (4−n)×25%

rules.label: Symbols
rules.text: Signal: QQQ. Execution: TQQQ / BIL

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open; trades only on state change

name: Mom20+OBV+Top-1 Step
description: A 4-state hybrid rotator that combines a 200-bar price median gate, a 20-day return, and an OBV regression slope on QQQ to allocate between TQQQ, the largest-cap stock, and a partial large-cap position. Rather than routing risk-off exposure to cash, the bear state parks 50% in the top market-cap stock. The OBV slope is derived from a 30-bar linear regression over manually computed on-balance volume.
overfit_notes: Three inputs: median gate, 20-day return, and 30-bar OBV regression slope > 0. The bear-state allocation (0.0/0.5) routing to equity rather than cash is a custom design choice.

rules.label: Trend gate
rules.text: QQQ price > 200-bar historical median

rules.label: Strength filter
rules.text: OBV linear regression slope (30 bars) > 0

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: n = count of: [trend gate, 20-day return, OBV slope positive]; n=3 → 100% TQQQ; n=2 → 50% TQQQ+50% Top-1; n=1 → 100% Top-1; n=0 → 50% Top-1

rules.label: Symbols
rules.text: Signal: QQQ. Execution: TQQQ / largest market-cap stock from top-100 dollar-volume universe

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open; trades only on state change

name: Mom20+MFI+OBV+Med 5-state

The OBV component uses a manually computed linear regression over 30 bars. This is the most comprehensive single-instrument signal stack in this batch.
overfit_notes: Four inputs: median gate, 20-day return, MFI(14) > 50, and OBV slope (30-bar regression) > 0. The 30-bar OBV window and the 5-level step table are tuned; the MFI and median thresholds are canonical.

rules.label: Trend gate
rules.text: QQQ price > 200-bar historical median

rules.label: Strength filter
rules.text: MFI(14) > 50 AND OBV linear regression slope (30 bars) > 0

rules.label: Entry

rules.label: Symbols
rules.text: Signal: QQQ. Execution: TQQQ / BIL

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open; trades only on state change

Unlike the BIL-only siblings, the bear state mixes the top market-cap stock with cash, and the intermediate states blend TQQQ with the top-1 large cap. The OBV slope is a 30-bar linear regression.

rules.label: Symbols

name: Mom20+ADX+Top2
description: A 4-state hybrid rotator that uses a 200-bar median gate, a 20-day return, and ADX directional bias on QQQ to step allocation across TQQQ, a 2-stock equal-weight large-cap basket, and BIL. The top-2 basket provides slightly more diversification than the top-1 variants while keeping the universe concentrated. The ADX signal uses the directional index comparison rather than an absolute level.
overfit_notes: Three inputs: median gate, 20-day return, ADX(14) +DI > -DI. The top-2 universe size is a custom parameter. The 4-state allocation table (1.0/0/0, 0.5/0.5/0, 0/1.0/0, 0/0.5/0.5) is consistent with the series.

rules.label: Trend gate
rules.text: QQQ price > 200-bar historical median

rules.label: Strength filter
rules.text: ADX(14) positive directional index > negative directional index

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: n = count of: [trend gate, 20-day return, ADX bullish]; n=3 → 100% TQQQ; n=2 → 50% TQQQ+50% Top-2; n=1 → 100% Top-2; n=0 → 50% Top-2+50% BIL

rules.label: Symbols
rules.text: Signal: QQQ. Execution: TQQQ / top-2 market-cap stocks (equal weight) / BIL

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open; trades only on state change
